prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科 中国大学主榜排名约第35名（2021–2026年稳定在33–35名区间），财经类院校中排名最高；2026年声誉评价未出现明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第99位（一 般），财经类院校整体短视频曝光偏弱；未见投档断档历史记录；应用经济学A+、工商管理A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，财经学科实力全国顶尖；统计学类（ 含数据科学）等专业契合当前大数据热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度分化观望，但计算机类、电子信息/通信、统计学等交叉学科热度持续偏高；本省2026年物理类考生按近年占比约68.2%估算约11.4万人，较2025年11.74万人略有减少。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年企稳、20 26年招生计划持平、财经类专业热度分化但上财品牌效应仍强、物理类考生规模略降，在2025年基准5669名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约5719名，区间5219–6219名 。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学（双学士学位、金融学和统计学）
- 经济学（双学士学位、经济学和信息与计算科学）
- 统计学类（含经济统计学、统计学实验班、数据科学）
- 会计学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 投资学（双学士学位、投资学和信息与计算科学）
- 保险学（精算与大数据）
- 经济学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理（商务分析）、工商管理（战略与创新创业）、市场营销、人力资源管理）
- 法学（涉外法治实验班、财经法治卓越班）
- 信息管理与信息系统
- 电子商务（商务智能）
- 国际经济与贸易。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 物理类招生专业丰富，位次在预测区间5219–6219名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如5300名以内）可重点冲击金融学 双学位、统计学类等热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 1227 → 2974 → 6319 → 5766 → 5669, with a significant backward shift from 2021 to 2023, stabilizing around 5700 in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 5669. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 31, 31, 31, 33, 34 respectively, showing a slight expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 34, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 35th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (stable in the 33–35 range from 2021 to 2026), the highest among finance and economics institutions; no significant negative public opinion in 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 99th (average), with overall short video exposure for finance and economics institutions being relatively weak; no history of enrollment gaps; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with top national strength in finance and economics disciplines; Statistics (including Data Science) and other majors align with current big data trends.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of finance/economics/economy majors is divided and wait-and-see, but interdisciplinary majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Statistics continue to have high popularity; the provincial Physics Category examinees in 2026, estimated at about 68.2% of total, are approximately 114,000, slightly decreasing from 117,400 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent two years, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, divided popularity of finance and economics majors but strong brand effect of SUFE, and a slight decrease in Physics Category examinees, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 5669; predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5719, with a range of 5219–6219.

- Accounting.

Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Investment (Double Degree, Investment and Information and Computing Science)

- Economics.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- E-commerce (Business Intelligence)
- International Economics and Trade.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Physics Category offers a wide range of majors. For rankings within the predicted range of 5219–6219, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 5300), prioritize applying for popular majors such as Finance Double Degree and Statistics.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 138 → 119 → 190 → 270 → 335, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 197 places in the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 335; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 4, 4, 4, 5, and 4 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 4, unchanged from 2025, with no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 35th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese Universities (stable in the 33-35 range from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 99th (average), with overall weak short video exposure for finance and economics institutions; no historical record of application gaps; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with top national strength in finance and economics disciplines, still strongly attractive to high-scoring students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
